name: PRIMEENERGY RESOURCES CORP
business: PrimeEnergy Resources Corporation is an independent oil and natural gas company engaged in acquiring, developing, and producing oil and natural gas. It sells its oil and gas production to unaffiliated third-party purchasers, independent marketing companies, and midstream companies. It also provides well-servicing support operations for many onshore oil and gas wells it operates, as well as for third parties.

exposures.sentence: We are an independent oil and natural gas company engaged in acquiring, developing, and producing oil and natural gas.
The Company's goal is to responsibly develop its oil and gas reserves, predominantly through horizontal drilling.
We have an active hedging program to mitigate risk regarding our cash flow and to protect returns from our development activity in the event of decreases in the prices received for our production.

catalysts.event: Participation in drilling of one 3-mile long horizontal well in Grady County, Oklahoma with Validus Energy II
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we have plans to participate with Validus Energy II in the drilling of one 3-mile long horizontal well in Grady County, Oklahoma with 3.47% interest, investing roughly $351,000 through completion.

catalysts.event: Participation in drilling of one 2.5-mile long horizontal in Garvin County, Oklahoma with Ovintiv Mid-Continent
catalysts.sentence: one well with Ovintiv Mid-Continent in the drilling of one 2.5-mile long horizontal in Garvin County, Oklahoma with 3.36% interest, investing roughly $291,000 through completion.

catalysts.event: Participation in drilling of one 3-mile long horizontal in Garvin County, Oklahoma with a 2.27% interest
catalysts.sentence: and one 3-mile long horizontal in Garvin County, Oklahoma with a 2.27% interest, investing roughly $194,000 through completion.
